$comment: Default template catalog for Casals. These WASMs are uploaded to the file-registry and authorized on the backend by scripts/seed.py. Each entry is one *version* of a template family (`key`); the authorized-WASM key is `<key>@<version>` and a sheet/upgrade that references a bare family name resolves to the latest version. List multiple entries with the same `key` to publish several versions. A `frontend`-kind template may carry an `asset` (a file uploaded to the registry); Casals uploads it into each stand built from that template after install, so the certified-assets canister actually serves a page.

templates.description: Rust hello-world canister (ic-cdk greet update; logs the name).
Motoko hello-world canister (greet update; logs the name).
Basilisk hello-world v1.1 — greeting tagged with the version.
Basilisk hello-world v1.2 — greet is an update that logs the name (ic-basilisk-toolkit logger).
DFINITY certified assets canister serving a hello-world page.
Baton orchestrator (Basilisk): managed_upgrade pipeline and commander model.
n-of-m multisig canister: top commander and IC controller of Batons.
